design_philosophy: E1 Anti-AI Design: Fusion over imitation, generous spacing, emotional warmth, contrast between elegant serif headings and clean sans-serif body. No standard center-aligned Bootstrap layouts.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tight text-[#2B2B2B]

surfaces_and_components.header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 border-b border-[#E6E2D6]/50 sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces_and_components.button_primary: bg-[#C05C3D] text-[#FDFBF7] px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-[#A84C30] transition-colors duration-300
surfaces_and_components.button_secondary: bg-transparent text-[#2B2B2B] px-8 py-4 border border-[#2B2B2B] rounded-none hover:bg-[#2B2B2B] hover:text-[#FDFBF7] transition-colors duration-300
surfaces_and_components.card: bg-[#F4F1EA] p-8 md:p-12 rounded-none border border-[#E6E2D6] transition-transform duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1
surfaces_and_components.whatsapp_float: fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300 flex items-center justify-center

images.description: Teddy bear, roses, daisy on grass - Use in the Hero section.
Single daisy candle on fabric - Use in the Product Showcase Gallery.
Orange flower candle with water droplets - Use in the Product Showcase Gallery.
Daisy candle on wood slice with baby's breath - Use in the Product Showcase Gallery.
A woman carefully setting a candle wick in her home workshop - Use in the About Us / Our Story section.
A candle burns beside a lamp in a cozy room - Use as a soft, low-opacity background or side image in the Testimonials section.

sections.name: Header & Nav
sections.instructions: Crystal glassmorphism sticky header. Logo 'Soil and Scent' on the left in Cormorant Garamond. Nav links (Shop, Story, Testimonials, Contact) hidden on mobile, hamburger for mobile. Instagram link icon and Shop Now CTA button on the right.

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.instructions: Overlapping asymmetric layout. Text left, large image right. Use the teddy bear/grass image. H1: 'Artisan Candles, Hand-Poured with Love'. H1 should break lines artistically. Subtext about beautiful artisan pieces. Primary CTA 'Explore Collection'. Add generous spacing (py-32).

sections.name: Product Gallery
sections.instructions: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode) layout for the 3 remaining product images. Do not make equal squares. Make one image large (col-span-8), another tall (col-span-4 row-span-2), etc. Add subtle hover zoom to images. Give each product a clean, elegant caption.

sections.name: Our Story
sections.instructions: Split layout. Warm sand background (#F4F1EA). Text block with high padding (p-12) on one side, artisan workshop image (woman setting wick) on the other. Use a serif heading and organic, narrative text.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.instructions: Minimalist slider or masonry grid. No standard cards. Use quote icons. Highlight text heavily. Background can have the cozy candle room image at 10% opacity.

sections.name: Footer & Contact
sections.instructions: Massive spacing (py-24). Dark earthy background (#2B2B2B) with inverse text (#FDFBF7) to create contrast. Large 'Let's Connect' heading. Include Instagram (@soilandscent) and Email links.

sections.name: Floating Action
sections.instructions: Fixed floating WhatsApp button. Background #25D366. Icon from lucide-react or react-icons. On click, it must open 'https://wa.me/8789028909?text=Hi!%20I'm%20interested%20in%20your%20candles'. Tooltip or hover effect should say 'Chat with us'.

technical_requirements.testing: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='whatsapp-float-button').
technical_requirements.accessibility: Ensure high contrast. Set text color explicitly on hover. Include aria-labels on icon buttons.
